relatedness_reasoning: While both files involve customer and account concepts, the inbound file reports arrears status from credit to customer_services, whereas the outbound file is a payment holiday application flowing from customer_services back to credit. These represent opposite directions and fundamentally different business processes: one is a status notification, the other is an application request. The outbound file requires customer contact details (name, email, phone), employee information, and application-specific fields (reason, supporting documents) that have no source in the inbound arrears status schema. The inbound file contains arrears-specific data (arrearsAmount, arrearsMonths, riskLevel) that would not logically feed into a payment holiday application. No clear data transformation pipeline connects these two message types.
